description:
This dataset contains demographic and lifestyle information for 11,500 patients collected from multiple hospitals across the United States.
The data was aggregated from electronic health records (EHRs) to support predictive analytics, lifestyle impact analysis, and healthcare research.

This dataset focuses on personal, demographic, and lifestyle factors such as age, gender, BMI, smoking habits, and physical activity levels. It is ideal for use in:

Healthcare analytics & predictive modeling

Lifestyle impact studies on chronic diseases

Medical data visualization & dashboards

Machine learning for patient risk stratification

Researchers can combine this dataset with clinical or treatment datasets to build predictive models for survival, readmission, or disease progression.

Dataset Characteristics
Rows: 11,500

Columns: 20

Unique Patient ID: patient_id

Data Source: Aggregated EHR data from several U.S. hospitals (anonymized)

Data Type: Mixed (Numerical + Categorical)

results.reason: Personally Identifiable Information (PII) is explicitly out of scope for sensitivity.
